system_architecture.full_name: NexusFlow — Cross-Channel AI Thread Intelligence Orchestration Layer
system_architecture.description: A real-time cross-channel AI thread export, sanitization, classification, and intelligence-routing system that connects disconnected multi-model chat environments into a unified processing backbone.

functional_layers.description: Multi-channel connector accepting webhooks, REST pull, WebSocket streaming, SSE, GraphQL, gRPC, and batch imports from all supported AI platforms.
Converts provider-specific payloads into canonical Thread and Message records. Preserves source metadata, model metadata, parent-child message relationships, tool calls, citations, and attachments.
functional_layers.output: Thread, Message records + ThreadCreated / MessageCreated events

functional_layers.description: TALON policy gate enforcing PII detection, secret scanning, credential quarantine, sensitive-topic classification, redaction, hashing, tokenization, and audit trail generation.
functional_layers.output: MessageSanitized events with redaction_log, risk_tags, policy_decision

functional_layers.description: Extracts structured Insight entities from sanitized content. Identifies decisions, feature requests, risks, action items, findings, blockers, and architecture notes. Generates vector embeddings for semantic search.
functional_layers.output: Insight records + InsightCreated events + Qdrant embeddings

functional_layers.description: Policy-based routing engine that dispatches sanitized intelligence to downstream systems via durable Temporal workflows. Supports retries, backoff, idempotency, fan-out, and dead-letter handling.
Unified operational interface providing conversation explorer, insight review, action tracker, evidence trail, routing monitor, policy admin, connector management, and model performance views.

mvp_v1_scope: Routing to one memory store and one knowledge base
